## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss AI-powered proposal generation for construction companies and explore potential productization or service offerings.](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Noel's considering an AI-powered RFP response tool, leveraging historical data and ProjectMark info](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Marcel suggests starting with a service model (AI + experts) to extract more value, then transitioning to software](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [N8N recommended over AirOps for more robust vector DB capabilities and retrieval options](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Prototype development strategy: create workflows, test internally, then demo to Marcel before customer trials](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)

## Topics

### Current AI Landscape and Challenges

  - [Marcel's company processing \~3M words/month for clients (\~1B tokens)](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Outgrowing existing platforms (AirOps, human loop, pipe training) at scale (100+ workflows)](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Platforms good for prototyping, struggle with high-volume production (10k+ processes/day)](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Balance between simplicity and power as user needs evolve](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)

### Proposal Generation Tool Concept

  - [Leverage historical RFP responses, ProjectMark data, and company info](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Multi-step workflow:](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
    1.  Ingest historical proposals
    2.  Gather company data (core values, etc.)
    3.  Upload new RFP
    4.  Auto-generate responses using historical + current data
  - [Potential to save construction companies significant time](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)

### Technical Implementation Insights

  - [N8N recommended over AirOps for better retrieval and vector DB capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Custom knowledge bases crucial for efficient retrieval](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Vector DBs preferred over regular DBs for this use case](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Prototype could be built in \~1 day with proper data setup](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)

### Monetization Strategy

  - [Marcel suggests service-first approach:](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1188.0)
      - [Position as "AI + construction experts" service](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
      - [Charge premium ($10k/month vs $20k/year for software-only)](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)
      - [Transition to software product later](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Emphasize early adopter benefits, showcase rapid turnaround](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)

### Next Steps for Noel

1.  Collaborate with Jonathan (designer exploring GPTs) on prototype
2.  Test workflows and create initial prototype
3.  Demo prototype to Marcel for feedback
4.  Select test customer for real-world trial

## Next Steps

  - [Noel to work with team on creating prototype workflows](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
  - [Gather 10-50 historical RFPs and one "test" RFP for prototype development](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Explore N8N as primary platform for development](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Create Loom video demo of prototype for internal review](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
  - [Circle back with Marcel in \~1 week with progress update](https://fathom.video/share/y8txLGQkCUkf-okovuCTXKHTz14tdGMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
